---
title: "The Jo Lab"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <img src="images/group_pictures/psr.jpeg" alt="PSR" class="hero__img">
  <div class="hero__overlay">
    <h2 class="hero__title">Welcome to The Jo Lab</h2>
    <p class="hero__text">
      We study functional genomics in plant environmental responses and development. We are part of the Plant Stress Resilience group at the Utrecht University in the Netherlands.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```
